text:

  },
  {
    "thinking": "The screen content changes to a new set of instructions, asking the user to think aloud.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",

    "description": "New instructions 'Please think aloud...' appear on the screen.",

    "frame_description": "Dark screen with white text: 'Please think aloud as you work through this, sharing your thoughts and describing what you're thinking, and any questions that come to mind. Imagine you just completed the task.'."
  },
  {

    "description": "Final instructions about opening the website appear.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "Dark screen with white text: 'I'm going to open the website in your browser now. If you don't see the website, click the button below to open it.'."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The browser navigates to a new URL, which is the prototype for the user testing session.",
